query:
SELECT b.id as "id!: String" FROM blocks b
           INNER JOIN block_properties p
               ON p.block_id = b.id
              AND p.key = 'space'
              AND p.value_ref = ?
           WHERE b.block_type = 'page'
             AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
             AND b.id < ?
             AND NOT EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1 FROM block_properties s
                 WHERE s.block_id = b.id
                   AND s.key = 'is_space'
                   AND s.value_text = 'true'
             )
           ORDER BY b.id
